title: Buffalo Soldier
why_this_song: Buffalo Soldier by Bob Marley (1983) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 16 times; first heard in: "Buffalo soldier, dreadlock Rasta"
Appears 16 times; first heard in: "Buffalo soldier, dreadlock Rasta"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Stolen from Africa, brought to America"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Fight on arrival, fighting for survival"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Buffalo soldier, dreadlock Rasta"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "buffalo" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "buffalo" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "soldier" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: Then you would know where you're coming from
Said he was a buffalo soldier, dreadlock Rasta

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Buffalo Soldier" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Buffalo Soldier"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Bob Marley one question about "Buffalo Soldier", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Bob Marley sobre "Buffalo Soldier", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Buffalo Soldier" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Buffalo Soldier" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
